DriveX Motors — static site
===========================

HOW TO PUBLISH ON HOSTINGER (shared Web Hosting):
1. Log in to hPanel > Files > File Manager.
2. Open the public_html folder.
3. Upload EVERYTHING inside this folder (index.html, css/, js/, images/,
   .htaccess, etc.) into public_html. (Tip: zip this folder, upload the zip,
   then "Extract" inside public_html.)
4. Visit your domain — the site is live.

MANAGE YOUR CARS:
- Edit  js/data.js  to add / edit / remove vehicles (instructions are at the
  top of that file). Re-upload it after changes.
- Add car photos into the images/ folder and reference them in data.js.

NOTES:
- Set your real domain before building for accurate links/sitemap:
    STATIC_DOMAIN=https://yourdomain.com node build-static.js   (current: https://www.drivexmotors.ae)
- The contact form opens WhatsApp with the message (no server needed).
- There is no admin panel in the static version (manage cars via data.js).
- Open the site through your domain (or a local web server), not by double-
  clicking the .html files — the shared "/css, /js, /images" paths need a
  web root to resolve.
